title: Title
doc_html:
PART I-A. LOUISIANA DOMESTIC ABUSE FATALITY REVIEW PANEL

§2024.1. Title

            This Part shall be known and cited as the "Louisiana Domestic Abuse Fatality Review Panel Law".

            Acts 2021, No. 320, §2, See Act.
doc_text:
PART I-A.  LOUISIANA DOMESTIC ABUSE FATALITY REVIEW PANEL
§2024.1.  Title
This Part shall be known and cited as the "Louisiana Domestic Abuse Fatality Review
Panel Law".
Acts 2021, No. 320, §2, See Act.
